→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:9+4=13 vs DC 15] FAIL!
Young Red Dragon is paralyzed and falls! 8 falling damage. HP: 170/178
Young Red Dragon is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Young Red Dragon WIS save vs Hold Person: [d20:10+4=14 vs DC 15] FAIL — still paralyzed.

=== ROUND 3 ===

--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon attacks Satyr — Armored Escapist with Bite: [d20:12+10=22 vs AC 20] HIT! 25 damage. Satyr — Armored Escapist HP: 34/59
→ Satyr — Armored Escapist loses concentration on Hold Person! [CON save 6 vs DC 12]
Young Red Dragon attacks Satyr — Armored Escapist with Bite: [d20:18+10=28 vs AC 20] HIT! 13 damage. Satyr — Armored Escapist HP: 21/59

=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 3 rounds ===
